title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR THE ESTABLISHMENT OF AN EMERGENCY HOSPITAL IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF PANDAN, PROVINCE OF CATANDUANES, TO BE KNOWN AS THE PANDAN EMERGENCY HOSPITAL, AND AUTHORIZING THE APPROPRIATION OF FUNDS  THEREFOR.

chunks.text:
H. No. 2654 / 58 OG No. 3, 437 (January 15, 1962)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 3143, June 17, 1961 ]

AN ACT PROVIDING FOR THE ESTABLISHMENT OF AN EMERGENCY HOSPITAL IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF PANDAN, PROVINCE OF CATANDUANES, TO BE KNOWN AS THE PANDAN EMERGENCY HOSPITAL, AND AUTHORIZING THE APPROPRIATION OF FUNDS THEREFOR.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. There shall be established, under the supervision of the Director of Medical Services, an emergency hospital in the Municipality of Pandan, Province of Catanduanes, to be known as the Pandan Emergency Hospital. The site for said hospital shall be determined by the Municipal Council of the Municipality of Pandan in consultation with the Director of Medical Services.

SEC. 2. The Secretary of Health shall issue such rules and regulations as may be necessary to carry out the purpose of this Act.

SEC. 2. The Secretary of Health shall issue such rules and regulations as may be necessary to carry out the purpose of this Act.

SEC. 3. The sum of two hundred thousand pesos is hereby authorized to be appropriated, out of any funds in the National Treasury not otherwise appropriated, for the establishment, operation and maintenance of said hospital during the fiscal year nineteen hundred sixty-two. Such sums as may be needed for the same purpose in subsequent years shall be included in the annual General Appropriation Acts.

SEC. 4. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, June 17, 1961.
